name: Liandry's Torment

passives.name: Torment
passives.effects: Dealing [[ability damage]] burns enemies, causing them to take{{ft|{{as|1% of the target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds over 3 seconds, capped at 20 per tick against monsters.|{{as|6% of the target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|'''total''' magic damage}} over 3 seconds, capped at 120 against monsters.}}

passives.name: Suffering
passives.effects: For each second in combat with enemy champions, deal 2% increased damage, stacking up to 3 times for a total of 6%.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing [[ability damage]] burns enemies, causing them to take{{ft {{as 1% of the target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as magic damage}} every {{fd 0.5}} seconds over 3 seconds, capped at 20 per tick against monsters
For each second in combat with enemy champions, deal 2% increased damage, stacking up to 3 times for a total of 6%.

simpleDescription: Charge up in combat to deal high damage over time, especially against durable enemies

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Liandry's Torment is modeled as sustained anti-health burn pressure: periodic max-health magic damage plus an in-combat ramping damage amp.
Torment total is explicitly represented as six 0.5-second ticks over 3 seconds (6% target max health total before monster cap handling).
